exercises.name: Pilates - Donkey Kick with Ball Below Knee
exercises.alternateName: Pilates - Glute Kick with Ball Below Knee
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees. Place a ball under one knee and press into it as you perform donkey kicks.

exercises.name: Pilates - Donkey Kick with Ball Between Knee
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees. Place a ball behind one knee and squeeze as you lift your foot toward the ceiling.

exercises.name: Pilates - Donkey Kicks
exercises.alternateName: Pilates - Pulse Glute kicks single leg
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees. Keep one knee bent as you lift the foot toward the ceiling. Lower and repeat before switching sides.

exercises.name: Pilates - Double Leg Kick
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, clasp hands behind your back, lift the chest, and kick both legs towards the glutes before lowering.

exercises.name: Pilates - Double Leg Lower Lift
exercises.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Engage your core and lower both legs down without arching your back, then lift them back up.

exercises.name: Pilates - Double Leg Stretch
exercises.description: Lie on your back, lift your head and shoulders, extend both arms and legs outward, then circle the arms back while drawing the knees in.

exercises.name: Pilates - Double-Leg Stretch with Ball Between Ankles
exercises.description: Lie on your back holding a ball between your ankles. Extend arms and legs out, then bring them back together.

exercises.name: Pilates - Frog
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet together. Extend legs out at an angle, then bring them back in while keeping control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Glute Bridge with Ball Squeeze
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Place a ball between your knees and squeeze while lifting into a bridge.

exercises.name: Pilates - Glute Bridge with Feet on Ball
exercises.description: Lie on your back with feet on a ball. Lift your hips into a bridge while keeping balance.

exercises.name: Pilates - Glute Bridge with Marching
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift hips into a bridge position and alternate lifting one foot at a time while keeping the hips stable.

exercises.name: Pilates - Hip Circles
exercises.description: Sit back slightly on your hands, extend legs to 45 degrees, and move them in a controlled circular motion.

exercises.name: Pilates - Inner Thigh Squeeze with Ball Between Knees
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent and a ball between your knees. Squeeze the ball to engage your inner thighs.

exercises.name: Pilates - Ipsilateral Dead Bug with Ball
exercises.alternateName: Pilates - Bird Dog with Ball Squeeze (between arm and leg) Deadbug
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees. Place a ball between one hand and opposite knee. Extend them out while keeping control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Jackknife
exercises.description: Lie on your back, lift legs overhead, then extend them straight up before lowering them back down with control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Kneeling Side Kick
exercises.description: Kneel on one knee with the other leg extended, kick the leg forward and backward with control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Leg Beats (Prone Position)
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach with legs extended. Lift your legs slightly and pulse them up and down in a controlled motion.

exercises.name: Pilates - Leg Pull Back
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended, hands behind hips, lift hips, and alternate lifting legs in a controlled motion.

exercises.name: Pilates - Leg Pull Front
exercises.description: Hold a plank position, lift one leg slightly, hold, then lower and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Pilates - Low Scissors
exercises.description: Lie on your back with legs extended. Lower one leg toward the mat while keeping the other lifted. Switch legs in a controlled scissor motion.

exercises.name: Pilates - Lunge with Side Stretch
exercises.description: Step into a lunge and reach one arm overhead to stretch the side body.

exercises.name: Pilates - Mermaid Stretch with Ball Under Side Hand
exercises.description: Sit with legs to one side and place a ball under your hand. Lean into the stretch to open the side body.

exercises.name: Pilates - Miniband Front to Back Lunge
exercises.alternateName: Miniband rocking lunge, weight shifting lunge
exercises.description: Step one foot back into a lunge while keeping a miniband around your thighs. Alternate legs.

exercises.name: Pilates - Miniband Reverse Lunge to Knee Drive
exercises.description: Step back into a lunge, then drive the knee forward while keeping band resistance.

exercises.name: Pilates - Miniband Single Squat Leg Raise
exercises.description: Squat with a miniband around your thighs, then lift one leg to the side as you stand up.

exercises.name: Pilates - Miniband Split Lunge to Back Leg Raise
exercises.alternateName: Miniband lunge to glute kick single leg
exercises.description: Perform a split lunge, then lift the back leg up while keeping tension on the band.

exercises.name: Pilates - Miniband Squat to Curtsy Lunge
exercises.alternateName: Banded Squat to Curtsey Lunge Single Leg
exercises.description: Step one foot behind in a curtsey lunge while keeping the miniband around your thighs. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Pilates - Modified Hundred (Feet on Mat)
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift your head and shoulders, extend arms forward, and pulse them up and down while breathing in and out.

exercises.name: Pilates - Neck Pull
exercises.description: Lie on your back, hands behind your head, roll up slowly to a seated position, hinge forward, then roll back down with control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Oblique Roll-Back
exercises.description: Sit with knees bent and feet on the floor. Lean back slightly and rotate your torso to one side. Return to center and switch sides.

exercises.name: Pilates - Oblique Twists with Ball
exercises.description: Sit with knees bent and hold a ball in both hands. Rotate your torso side to side while keeping your core engaged.

exercises.name: Pilates - Open Leg Rocker Balance Hold
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended and slightly apart. Hold your ankles and balance while engaging your core.

exercises.name: Pilates - Open-Leg Rocker
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended in a V-shape, hold ankles, roll back onto shoulders, then roll forward to balance again.

exercises.name: Pilates - Overhead Arm Stretch with Ball Squeeze
exercises.description: Stand or sit tall and hold a ball overhead. Press into the ball as you stretch upward.

exercises.name: Pilates - Overhead Tricep Extension with Ball Squeeze
exercises.description: Hold a ball behind your head with both hands. Press into the ball while stretching your triceps.

exercises.name: Pilates - Plank to Pike
exercises.description: Start in a plank position. Engage your core and lift your hips toward the ceiling, then return to plank.

exercises.name: Pilates - Plank with Ball Under Toes
exercises.description: Start in a plank position with your toes on a ball. Engage your core to keep stable while holding the plank.

exercises.name: Pilates - Push-Up with Ball Under One Hand
exercises.description: Perform a push-up with one hand on a ball, challenging your stability and strength.

exercises.name: Pilates - Push-Ups (Pilates Style)
exercises.description: Begin in a plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulders. Lower your chest toward the mat, keeping elbows close to your body. Engage your core and push back up.

exercises.name: Pilates - Rocking
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, grab ankles, and lift chest and legs off the mat while balancing on the abdomen.
